backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining product catalog, WhatsApp order management, user profiles, and admin access control with blob storage integration for product images.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: removal of search/filtering from ProductCatalogSection and addition of a 'Browse All Products' horizontal bar with catalog link.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files describing the light green/crimson/white color palette, navigation system, marketing sections, product catalog, and removed cart functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base layer defining CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color schemes using OKLCH format with grayscale and accent colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Open Graph properties, Inter font preconnect, and Goodwill favicon reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with view-based routing (home/admin), QueryClient setup, CONTACT_CONFIG constants, and rendering of marketing sections plus ProductCatalogSection on homepage.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminGuard: Protected route component that checks Internet Identity authentication and admin permissions, displaying appropriate loading, login, or access denied states.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSetti: Admin settings interface for managing company Gmail contact and custom domain with suggested domain pre-population, normalization on blur, and clipboard copy functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/BulkImport: Dialog component for bulk importing products via JSON file upload or text input, with validation, parsing, and success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderDetai: Side drawer displaying detailed WhatsApp order information with status update controls and JSON/CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrdersAdmi: Admin table component listing all WhatsApp orders with status badges, date formatting, and detail view trigger.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductEdi: Dialog for creating and editing products with form fields for name, category, description, stock status, and image upload with preview.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductsAd: Admin table displaying all products with image previews, category labels, stock badges, and actions for add, edit, delete, and bulk import.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component handling Internet Identity authentication with login/logout states and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/marketing/AboutS: Marketing section displaying company history, values, and WD-40 distributor status with checkmark list and branded messaging.
frontend/src/components/marketing/Contac: Displays a contact section with phone numbers, WhatsApp links, and email (fetched from API or fallback config) in card layouts with icons and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/marketing/Experi: Showcases the company's value proposition with a list of benefits (fast recommendations, quality assurance, etc.) in a grid of hoverable cards with checkmark icons.
frontend/src/components/marketing/HeroSe: Full-screen hero section with background image, headline, subheading, CTA buttons for viewing products and calling, plus trust indicators.
frontend/src/components/marketing/Produc: Renders a grid of six product category cards (Lubricants, Mechanical Packing, Fluid Sealants, etc.) with icons, titles, and descriptions.
Section wrapper that displays the ProductCategoriesGrid with a heading and a button to scroll to the full product catalog.
frontend/src/components/marketing/SiteFo: Footer component showing company name, copyright, GST number, and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link with heart icon.
frontend/src/components/marketing/SiteHe: Sticky header with company logo, desktop/mobile navigation menus, admin button, and call-now CTA; handles smooth scrolling to sections and view navigation.
frontend/src/components/marketing/TrustI: Displays a row of badge indicators (Trusted by Professionals, Verified Business, etc.) with checkmark icons for social proof.
frontend/src/components/marketing/WhyCho: Section highlighting five reasons to choose the company (high ratings, trusted by professionals, etc.) in a grid of icon-based cards.
frontend/src/components/store/AsbestosWa: Alert component displaying safety warnings and handling instructions for asbestos-containing products, with 'warning' or 'info' variants.
frontend/src/components/store/ProductCar: React component that displays a product card with image, details, stock status, quantity selector, and WhatsApp inquiry button. Includes special handling for asbestos products with acknowledgment checkbox.
frontend/src/components/store/ProductCat: Section component that displays a grid of all products using ProductCard components, with loading skeletons and empty state handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializing access control with admin token and invalidating queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Empty file placeholder for cart-related hooks.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductImageUpload: Custom hook for uploading product images with validation, progress tracking, and ExternalBlob conversion from file bytes.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all product and order CRUD operations, including queries for fetching products by category/search and mutations for admin operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color variables for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space, featuring light green primary and crimson red accent colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing products, WhatsApp orders, and settings, protected by AdminGuard component.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for cart page component.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for catalog page component.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for checkout page component.
frontend/src/utils/fileToBytes.ts: Validates image files (type and 10MB size limit) and converts File objects to Uint8Array for upload using FileReader.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeDomain.ts: Normalizes domain strings by removing protocols, www prefix, paths, and converting to lowercase for canonical comparison.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeSearchText.t: Normalizes text for search by converting to lowercase, trimming whitespace, and collapsing multiple spaces.
frontend/src/utils/parseProductsImportJs: Parses and validates JSON arrays of products for import, mapping category strings to enums and normalizing stock status formats.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
Formats customer order details and cart items into WhatsApp messages and generates WhatsApp URLs for orders and product inquiries.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, industrial-themed shadows, metal texture background, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file showing completed features for removing search/filtering from ProductCatalogSection and adding a 'Browse All Products' link bar.
